description: Use this API to purge an individual OPF adjustable bus shunt data record from the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.2.0. ierr = purge_opf_adjvar_indv_3(eibus, enod, shntid)

parameters.name: enod
parameters.description: The section number or the node number of one of the nodes in the bus section of interest. specify 0 (zero) if the bus is represented by a single bus section. if 0 is specified and the bus is represented by multiple bus sections, then the data of the parent bus and not that of one of the bus sections is changed. (input).

parameters.name: shntid
parameters.description: Bus shunt identifier. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: adjustable bus shunt identifier is more than two characters.
blank adjustable bus shunt identifier is invalid.
OPF adjustable bus shunt at bus not found.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
bus does not belong to a substation.
node is not found in the substation.
node is not connected to any bus section of bus.
